payload.description: Archetypes for FIFA partner brands. Uses generic categories rather than real brand names.

brand_archetypes.goals: Maximize kit and merchandise visibility during knockout stages. Player endorsement activation peaks during semifinals and final.
brand_archetypes.risk_tolerance: low — avoids political controversy, favors unity narratives

brand_archetypes.goals: Global brand association with celebration moments. In-stadium and watch-party activation.
brand_archetypes.risk_tolerance: medium — leans into emotional moments, avoids health controversy

brand_archetypes.goals: Innovation visibility — VAR, fan experience tech, broadcast enhancement.
brand_archetypes.risk_tolerance: low — focuses on product, avoids emotional narratives

brand_archetypes.goals: Mobility and national pride association. Regional campaigns in host nations.
brand_archetypes.risk_tolerance: medium — engages with national narratives carefully

payload.default_stance: brand positive, risk averse, globally unified messaging
